# Quick start (checklist)

## Day 0 — Access

- [ ] GitHub account with institutional email.
- [ ] Org invite (if any) or planned fork.
- [ ] Skim [Lineamientos_colaboradores](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/Lineamientos_colaboradores) (~15 min).

## Day 1 — Environment

- [ ] Install [Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/) if you will edit this manual.
- [ ] R ≥ 4.2 or project-appropriate Python + VS Code / RStudio / Positron.
- [ ] Configure `git` name + verified email.

## Day 2 — First repo

1. Clone a reference repo (e.g. [CIIIA-ClimateBirthWeightAnalysis](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/CIIIA-ClimateBirthWeightAnalysis)).
2. Branch `setup/<your-initials>`.
3. Confirm `README` script order matches reality.
4. Run at least one `Descriptive/` script on a test slice if full data is heavy.

## Before publishing findings

- [ ] `README` documents external data + funding.
- [ ] `Output_Analysis` only has agreed finals.
- [ ] No secrets or identifiable tables in history.

## Updating this manual

```bash
quarto preview
quarto render               # Spanish → _site/
cd english && quarto render && cd ..   # English → _site/en/
```

On `push` to `main`, [.github/workflows/publish.yml](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/eblab-manual/blob/main/.github/workflows/publish.yml) publishes `gh-pages`.

Public URL: [https://climchange-newbornhealth.github.io/eblab-manual/](https://climchange-newbornhealth.github.io/eblab-manual/)

**Settings → Pages** should use branch `gh-pages`, folder `/ (root)`.
